summary: Fix a memory leak where an instantiated scene is never freed
prompt: The script below instantiates a popup scene and shows it, but the popup is never freed when the player dismisses it. The popup emits a `close_requested` signal. Connect to this signal and call `queue_free()` on the popup when it fires. The connection should use a lambda (anonymous function) to capture the popup reference.
evaluation_notes: Must connect close_requested signal. Lambda syntax: popup.close_requested.connect(func(): popup.queue_free()). Or named method with popup reference. Must actually free popup, not just hide it.
